name: MEI FENG
title: Foreman

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Hardened By Work
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone) to heal 3 and remove up to one token.

abilities.name: Hazard Pay
abilities.text: When a friendly model within 6" would gain a token, this model may drain a (soulstone) for it not to.

abilities.name: Heated Iron
abilities.text: Once per activation. After a Scrap marker is removed within 6", deal 1 damage to enemy models within (x)1" of that marker.

triggers.name: Steelcraft
triggers.text: Summon a Metal Gamin in base contact with a Scrap marker within 3" of this model, then remove the marker.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: "Helmets, People!"
actions.effects: Target gains a Stunned token. If this action receives a raise, the target must discard a card or drain a (fortitude) or be killed.

triggers.name: Drive Out Slag
triggers.text: Make a Scrap marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Shifting Girders
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a friendly Scrap marker.
actions.effects: Remove the target to draw a card.

triggers.name: Steel Current
triggers.text: When resolving, place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Cautionary Tale
triggers.text: When resolving, a friendly model within 2" of the target gains either a Bolstered or Shielded token.

extraction_notes: Fortitude and Warding icons rendered as (fortitude) and (warding) in trigger suits based on standard icon interpretation
